Veterans Benefits: Iowa exempts military retirement pay and survivor benefits from state income tax, offers military and disabled-veteran property tax relief, and provides state veterans services including employment, education, and county veterans-affairs assistance.
LGBTQSource: MAP Iowa state policy score; no Carroll MEI score located
Description: West-central Iowa county seat with St. Anthony Regional Hospital, a local VA clinic, DMACC Carroll, an 18-hole municipal golf course, community arts programming, and access to Swan Lake State Park and the 33-mile Sauk Rail Trail. Carroll offers low housing and cost-of-living metrics, but has cold snowy winters and strongly Republican county-level presidential returns that moved further right from 2016 to 2024.
